allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\kenny\\Documents\\app_delivery" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -notin @\("backend","frontend","backend_delivery"\) } | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime | Format-Table)

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\kenny\\Documents\\app_delivery\\backend"; .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import psycopg; conn = psycopg.connect\('postgresql://postgres:123456@localhost:5432/chikenhot_db'\); cur = conn.cursor\(\); cur.execute\(\\"ALTER TABLE delivery_profiles ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_assigned_at TIMESTAMP NULL\\"\); cur.execute\(\\"CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ix_delivery_profiles_last_assigned_at ON delivery_profiles\(last_assigned_at\)\\"\); conn.commit\(\); print\('OK columna creada'\); conn.close\(\)" 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell(try { $b = Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8000/health -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "Backend OK: $\($b | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Host "Backend DOWN" }; try { $f = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5173/ -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Frontend OK: $\($f.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Frontend DOWN" })

PowerShell(try { $b = Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8000/health -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "Backend: OK" } catch { Write-Host "Backend: DOWN" }; try { $f = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5173/ -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Frontend: OK \($\($f.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "Frontend: DOWN" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/products/categories?include_inactive=true" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "GET /categories?include_inactive=true OK \($\($r.Count\) categorías\)" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; Set-Location "c:\\Users\\kenny\\Documents\\app_delivery\\backend"; .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe test_driver_reg.py 2>&1 | Out-String; Remove-Item test_driver_reg.py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
